CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a.*';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO '%[a-z]%';
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a(.*)b';
SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a.*');
SELECT t1.name FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.name SIMILAR TO '.*c.*' AND t2.name SIMILAR TO '.*e.*';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a.+c';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a%[0-9]';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a.*') AS subquery WHERE name SIMILAR TO '.*[b]%%';
SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO '([a-zA-Z]+)';
DELETE FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a%';
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE data SIMILAR TO '%t%';
SELECT data FROM test_data WHERE data SIMILAR TO 'a.*' INTERSECT SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE name SIMILAR TO 'a.*';
